title: EnderBackpack
description: A backpack that acts as a second inventory. Can be customized
body:
**Ender Backpack**

**Why i should use this Mod ?**

Are you tired of the 27 slots inventory when today Minecraft vanilla includes more than 1000 different items ?
You want a bigger inventory without using a mod that enlarges the player's inventory and sometimes leads to incompatibility problems with other mods ?
You are tired of mods that add easily craftable backpacks and replace the interest for shulkerboxes ?

**Description**

This mod adds a new item called «Ender Backpack» which allows to store items inside. It’s like an EnderChest
You can use it by doing a right click when you hold it in your hand without being in sneak

**What's configurable ?**

1. You can chose if players will receive the backpack when they log in (only if they don't already have one) or if they have to craft it

2. You can choose if you want the contents of the backpack to be dropped to the ground when the players die

3. You can configure a size for the backpack according to the time the player has spent on the server
